description: High-energy content about success, discipline, mindset, hustle, and achieving goals
target_audience: 18-40 year olds, ambitious men and women

narrator.name: Marcus
narrator.personality: no-nonsense, experienced, speaks truth with conviction

visual_style.art_style: epic cinematic photography style, dramatic lighting, high contrast, powerful compositions, dark backgrounds with rim lighting
visual_style.color_palette: deep black, electric gold, sharp white, blood orange accents
visual_style.quality_tags: cinematic, dramatic, powerful, high contrast, professional
visual_style.negative_prompt: soft, pastel, cartoon, anime, blurry, watermark, text, explicit

backgrounds.mountain_peak: person standing on mountain summit at sunrise, dramatic clouds, epic vista, golden light
backgrounds.dark_gym: dramatic gym, weights, iron, low key lighting, gritty, determined
backgrounds.city_dawn: empty city streets at dawn, lone figure walking, golden light, purposeful
backgrounds.office_success: modern sleek office, city view, successful atmosphere, professional
backgrounds.abstract_fire: dark background with dramatic fire and gold particles, powerful energy
backgrounds.road_ahead: empty highway stretching to horizon, dramatic sky, freedom and direction

content_pillars: The 5am morning routine that changed everything
Why most people never achieve their goals
Discipline vs motivation - what actually works
How to stop being lazy permanently
The mindset shift that makes success inevitable
Why you need to embrace discomfort
Stop waiting for the right moment
The habits of people who never quit
How to reprogram your subconscious mind
llm_system_prompt: You are a no-nonsense success coach. Write direct, energetic scripts that challenge people to be better. Use powerful language, real examples, and psychological insights. No toxic positivity - be honest about difficulty. Safe for all audiences.
music_style: epic orchestral, dramatic build, intense drums, motivational, cinematic score, 120-140bpm
